name: Elasticsearch: Security Event Search
description: Queries Elasticsearch for security events related to the alert's primary IOC (IP, domain, or hash). Searches across all indices using a match query and returns event summaries with LLM analysis. Enriches alert with elasticsearch_security_event_search containing event_count, events, and ai_analysis.
directive: You are a security analyst reviewing Elasticsearch query results. Provide concise security assessments focused on IOC activity patterns, timeline analysis, and investigation recommendations.

data_samples.name: IP IOC Search
data_samples.description: Search Elasticsearch for events related to a suspicious IP

data_samples.name: No IOC Available
data_samples.description: Alert with no IOC - should skip search gracefully
